title: gongora chocoensis
intro: Gongora chocoensis, also known as the Choco gongora, is a species of orchid native to the cloud forests of Colombia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Gongora chocoensis is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the roots and leaves in hot water, and is also used in herbal remedies to support immune function and overall well-being.
